name: dropdown-menu
description: A trigger + a menu of REAL items (links / actions), with ZERO JS. Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012, Wave 2/3) built on the popover overlay seam: show/hide via the native HTML `popover` attribute + `popovertarget` (top-layer, light-dismiss, aria-expanded wired by the browser); position via CSS Anchor Positioning; items are real <a href> (navigate JS-off, middle-click works) or real <button> (form action), each role=menuitem (WAI-ARIA APG menu-button, Radix DropdownMenu model). Replaces the <lv-dropdown-menu> Lit island. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, CSP-clean. Tab navigates the items (the platform); arrow-key roving is an optional typed-TS enhancer, not shipped.
docs: Copies the dropdown-menu family to your JTE root (lievit/dropdown-menu.jte + lievit/dropdown-menu/{item,separator,label,group,shortcut,sub}.jte), reached as @template.lievit.dropdown-menu(...). Pass a unique `id`, the `trigger` content, and compose the `content` slot from @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.item (give `href` for a navigation link, or `formId`/`formAction` for a form action; type=checkbox/radio renders the checked-state indicator glyph), @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.label (a group caption, inset to align under the indicator column), @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.group (role=group, aria-labelledby a label id), @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.shortcut (standalone keyboard hint), @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.sub (a nested submenu via native <details>, server-first; the hover/arrow flyout reveal is a deferrable typed-TS enhancer) and @template.lievit.dropdown-menu.separator. The browser owns show/hide + dismiss; CSS anchor positioning places the menu. Real links navigate with JS off. For a menu whose ITEMS are a server feed (a filtered command palette), use the command WIRE component instead.
